title: Commercial Cleaning in Newcastle: What You Should Expect From Your Cleaner
excerpt: Most commercial cleaning contracts under-deliver. Here's what a professional standard looks like — and the questions to ask before you sign.
author: Sarah Kelley
metaTitle: Commercial Cleaning Newcastle | Your Office Space
metaDescription: What should you expect from commercial cleaning in Newcastle? Sarah Kelley from Your Office Space outlines the standard — and the questions to ask before signing.
body:
## The standard most cleaning companies don't meet

Commercial cleaning in Newcastle is a crowded market. There are dozens of providers, most of them competing on price, and most of them delivering exactly what you'd expect from the cheapest option: inconsistent service, high staff turnover, and a phone that stops being answered once you've signed the contract.

This is not a generalisation. It's the pattern we see every time we pick up a new client.

Here's what professional commercial cleaning should actually look like.

## Same team, every time

The single most important indicator of service quality is whether you get the same people cleaning your space every visit.

High staff turnover means your space is constantly being cleaned by someone who doesn't know your building, doesn't know your standards, and doesn't have any stake in getting it right. They're temporary. The quality reflects that.

When the same team cleans your space week after week, they learn what matters. They know where the problems are. They develop a routine that actually works for your specific environment.

At Your Office Space, we assign a dedicated team to each site. That team stays with you.

## Monthly quality audits — not just when something goes wrong

Most cleaning contracts have a complaints process. You notice something wrong, you call, someone fixes it — eventually.

That's not a quality system. That's a reactive system.

Proactive quality management means regular site audits, before you notice a problem. We conduct monthly inspections of every site we clean. Standards are checked against a written standard. Issues are flagged and resolved before they affect your business.

You get a report. We get accountability.

## A direct line to the person running the operation

At Your Office Space, our cleaning division is led by Sarah Kelley. If something is wrong with your clean, you call Sarah — not a call centre, not an email queue.

The person who answers is the person who can fix it.

## What we clean

**Commercial offices** — Daily and regular commercial cleaning for professional offices of all sizes. Kitchen and break room, washrooms, carpet and hard floors, glass and windows.

**Medical practices and allied health** — Clinical-grade disinfection, infection control protocols, biohazard-compliant procedures, NDIS and privacy compliance. We understand the standards medical environments require.

**Childcare centres** — Child-safe products, strict protocols, play area deep cleaning, cot and bedding care. Safety comes first, without exception.

**Post-construction and industrial** — Site cleanup, dust removal, builder's clean and final handover preparation. We coordinate closely with your building and construction teams.

## The questions to ask before you sign

If you're evaluating commercial cleaning providers, ask these:

1. **Will the same team clean my site each visit?** If they can't guarantee this, staff turnover is high.
2. **Do you conduct regular quality audits?** If the answer is 'only when there's a complaint', that's your answer.
3. **Who do I call if something is wrong?** A direct name and number, not a general inbox.
4. **Are your staff employed directly or subcontracted?** Subcontracted cleaning is the primary driver of inconsistency.
5. **What products do you use and are they appropriate for my environment?** Particularly important for medical, childcare, and food-handling environments.

## Getting a quote

We offer a free site visit for any commercial property in Newcastle and the Hunter Valley. We'll walk your space, understand your requirements, and provide a clear proposal — no pressure, no surprises.

Contact Sarah directly: sarah.kelley@yourofficespace.au.
